name: Fairway Lounge
about: Fairway Lounge is an inclusive indoor golf venue located in Fitchburg, WI, offering a space for golfers to connect, compete, and play regardless of weather conditions. The facility operates six private bays equipped with industry-leading Trackman simulators, providing advanced technology for both practice and play. Guests can enjoy a welcoming atmosphere with full bar service, food options, and customizable event hosting capabilities, making it suitable for casual rounds, group outings, and corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: Six private bays with industry-leading Trackman simulators
Largest indoor Trackman Golf Simulator bays in Dane County
Full bar and food service available on-site
Welcoming atmosphere suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks and Salvatore's Pizza available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading simulators with largest indoor bays in Dane County

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers a full bar and serves Salvatore's Pizza and snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but booking is available by the hour for up to six players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Fairway Lounge is family-friendly and hosts youth birthday parties, offering a welcoming environment for all ages.
